things.name: Cidade Velha (Ribeira Grande)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage first European colonial city in the tropics - 15th-century ruins

things.name: Plateau District (Platô)
things.description: Historic plateau with colonial government buildings, the Sucupira Market and cathedral

things.name: Praia Beach (Quebra Canela)
things.description: City beach for swimming with a beachside cafe culture

things.name: Ethnographic Museum of Cape Verde
things.description: Colonial-era instruments, Creole culture and the batuque percussion tradition

things.name: Live Morna & Funaná Music
things.description: Cape Verdean melancholy morna (Cesaria Evora's music) and lively funaná

things.name: Sucupira Market
things.description: Largest market in Cape Verde with grogue rum, Creole textiles and fresh fish

things.name: Serra Malagueta Natural Park
things.description: Highest point of Santiago Island with cloud forest and endemic birds

things.name: Tarrafal Beach & Prison
things.description: Beautiful white sand bay and the former Salazar political prison on the north coast

things.name: Fogo Island Excursion
things.description: Flight to the active volcano island producing the finest wine in West Africa

things.name: Caldo de Peixe (Fish Broth)
things.description: Simple, perfect Cape Verdean fish soup with potatoes and fresh herbs
